message:
chore: update support matrix with stpcpy, strncmp, strnlen, stpncpy implementations

Add four new string ABI functions to support_matrix.json, all marked as
Implemented with perf_class strict_hotpath in the string_abi module:
stpcpy, strncmp, strnlen, stpncpy.

Bump total_exported from 250 to 254 and Implemented count from 147 to 151.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
